subject: [CPS] Unify way of KafkaTopic creation for CPS application
commit_message:
[CPS] Unify way of KafkaTopic creation for CPS application

Do not use static templates but "common.kafkatopic" template

Issue-ID: OOM-3240
Signed-off-by: Michal Jagiello <michal.jagiello@t-mobile.pl>
Change-Id: I67b2cfe839022795f8d7f6f42d2d8dc7e71653d6

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/6980/ : FAILURE

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/6980/ )
